texto: Friends are like sails – they help shield us against storms and provide the force that helps direct us on course. Friends enhance our lives in many ways: they listen to us when we need someone to talk to
autor: they support us when we feel vulnerable
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a they support us when we feel vulnerable: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Friends are like sails – they help shield us against storms and provide the force that helps dire…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e inspiracao.
